must_detect.matched_text:
Proposed Strategic Investment Term Sheet between Blue Peak Horizons Holdings Limited (a Main Board issuer in Hong Kong) and Juniper Harbour Capital Fund I, L.P. regarding a minority investment and associated M&A.
Investor to subscribe HK$420,000,000 in senior unsecured convertible notes to fund Blue Peak Horizons’ acquisition of Harborstone Digital Assets Ltd (HK) and GreenTide Renewables (HK) Limited, subject to applicable securities regulator and exchange requirements.
Convertible notes: 4.25% cash coupon; initial conversion price at 20% premium to last close; adjustment grid tied to internal FY2027 EBITDA forecast (not in any published guidance) and Harborstone’s VATP licence milestone; negative pledge and change‑of‑control put.
Use of proceeds: expansion of a licensed virtual asset OTC desk and a tokenised carbon credit platform pilot with two unnamed licensed counterparties; details remain confidential until an announcement is made and pricing is fixed.
Conditions precedent: no unresolved cyber incident beyond the previously disclosed 12 May 2026 intrusion within Harborstone’s staging environment; independent cyber review and remediation plan to the Investor’s satisfaction.
Due diligence: clean‑team access only to customer wallet‑flow aggregates and emissions baselines; no direct personal data extraction; PDPO‑compliant notices and information barriers maintained within Juniper Harbour Capital.
Insider governance: the Issuer will maintain and update an Insider List for all wall‑crossed persons (names, roles, office numbers, and masked emails), access‑controlled and retained under PDPO‑compliant protocols.
Dealing restrictions: no dealings by directors or the Investor in issuer securities during blackout windows under the Model Code and until a formal exchange announcement; all parties acknowledge SFO inside information obligations.
Disclosure controls: no selective disclosure to non‑wall‑crossed banks or analysts; any external briefings require pre‑clearance by the Issuer’s compliance team and confirmation that recipients are within the information barrier.
Announcements: an announcement under the Listing Rules will be made upon signing or when terms are fixed and price‑sensitive; draft disclosure to be settled by the Issuer and its compliance adviser before release via the exchange’s platform.
Exclusivity and fees: 60‑day exclusivity; no shop/no talk; break fee of HK$12,600,000 payable if the Issuer accepts a superior proposal prior to the long stop date; long stop date 30 September 2026.
Employment and retention: Ms. Aria Cheung (Head of VA Products) to enter a 24‑month retention agreement with a climate‑linked KPI bonus up to 30% of base; non‑solicit and non‑poach for key ESG and cyber personnel for 18 months.
Contacts and data room: Ms. Aria Cheung, aria.cheung@bluepeakhorizons.example; Mr. Daven Yip, d.yip@juniperharbour.example; all materials to be exchanged via the Issuer’s secure data room with multi‑factor authentication.
For staff education and client marketing only, the company’s ESG and crypto glossaries explain terms such as tokenisation, insider list, and cyber hygiene at a high level and contain no deal‑specific or price‑sensitive information.
This term sheet is non‑binding (save for confidentiality, exclusivity, governing law, and costs) and governed by Hong Kong law; any tipping or informal bri
